metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4751
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 1b: "Cell surface NCAM was labeled by indirect immunofluorescence of formaldehyde-fixed hippocampal neurons maintained in culture for 12 d. Neurons were then permeabilized and labeled with antibodies against synaptophysin and AP-2 or AP-3. Note that NCAM- and synaptophysin-positive clusters colocalize with AP-2 and AP-3 accumulations"

Figure 1c: "Hippocampal neurons maintained in culture for 12 d were colabeled with antibodies against synaptophysin, AP-2, and AP-3. Note overlapping accumulations of AP-2 and AP-3, which colocalize with synaptophysin-positive clusters"

Presynaptic localization is further supported by AP3 involvement in SV endocytosis (Figure 8). The antibody for AP3 targeted AP3B2.. Experimental description: M&M: "To prepare cultures of hippocampal neurons, 1- to 3-d-old C57BL/6J and NCAM-/- mice of either sex from homozygous breeding pairs were used."

antibody:
"neuronal adaptin-like protein beta (βNAP) subunit of AP-3 (clone 18, catalog #610892)"
note; this is AP3B2

checks.label: OWL Consistency
checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
